title: Calpol Sugar-Free Infant Suspension Paracetamol (1 x 100ml), Strawberry Flavour CalpolInfant with Paracetamol for Fever & Pain Relief, Suitable for 2+ Months Babies & Kids
features: This product is quantity restricted and a maximum of 2 products containing paracetamol, aspirin or ibuprofen can be bought per week per customer.
Tough on pain but gentle on little tummies
Gets to work on fever in 15 minutes
Contains paracetamol; for pain and fever; always read the label; can be used in infants from 2 months old (weighing over 4 kg and not premature)
description: Product Description Calpol Sugar-Free Infant Suspension Paracetamol (1 x 100ml) - Gentle Pain & Fever Relief The Calpol Infant Suspension Range provides soothing relief from pain and fever for your children when they need it most. The strawberry-flavoured medicine containing paracetamol helps relieve pain and fever (high temperature) in many conditions, including post-immunisation fever, cold and flu symptoms, teething, headache, and earache. It starts to reduce fever in just 15 minutes and is gentle enough for babies and children aged from 2 months to 6 years, weighing more than 4kg (not premature). Each pack comes with an easy dose syringe, aiding administration with minimal mess! For usage instructions, see the product leaflet. Product Benefits at A Glance Infant Suspension Paracetamol For pain and fever relief For infants from 2+ months Starts to reduce fever in 15 min Tough on pain, gentle on tummies Calpol syringe included 1 x 100ml Ingredients Active Ingredients: paracetamol Other Ingredients: Contains Maltitol liquid,Sorbitol solution (70% non crystallising) (E420), Glycerol, Microcrystalline cellulose and carmellose sodium, Xanthan gum, Ethyl parahydroxybenzoate (E214), Methyl parahydroxybenzoate (E218), Propyl parahydroxybenzoate (E216), Polysorbate 80, Strawberry flavour (containing propylene glycol (E1520) and benzyl alcohol), Carmoisine (E122), Purified water Safety Warning Do not store above 25°C. Keep container in outer carton. KEEP OUT OF THE REACH AND SIGHT OF CHILDREN. Min Age Limit (Advisory): 2 Months Manufacturer Contact Information Johnson & Johnson Limited, 50-100 Holmers Farm Way, High Wycombe HP12 4DP See more
